line_map.line: A coin! A toy! Oil in the soil!
Boil! Coil! Point! Enjoy the toy!
The boy and the coin! Where is the coin? Down in the soil!
The boy is Sam. Sam sees a coin. Sam digs in the soil!
The coin is for a toy! Sam has so much joy!
Boil? Coil? Point? A coin! A coin!
What is in the soil?! POTATO! that's a thousand words!

wrong_art.issue: Sam rendered BALD (smooth wooden head, no hair) - contradicts the canonical hairy design used in boy.png (card), sam-picks-coin.png, sam-joy.png, sam-toy.png, coin-best.png. This is book spread 1 - the character's INTRODUCTION portrait - so the wrong version is the one that sets first impression.
wrong_art.fix: regenerate with shaggy brown hair matching boy.png canonical
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a wooden peg doll boy with shaggy brown carved hair (matching canonical Sam) in a red shirt standing with hands on hips ready, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: peg-doll boy wears a TEAL/BLUE-GREY shirt instead of the canonical RED shirt seen in every other Sam image this week
wrong_art.fix: regenerate with red shirt and matching hair color
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a glint of a small gold coin half-buried in dark soil with a peg doll boy in a RED shirt and shaggy brown hair crouched pointing at it wide-eyed, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw
